description.zh: MCP 客户端连接、工具发现、OAuth 认证和调用分发
description.en: MCP client connection, tool discovery, OAuth auth, and call dispatch

content.zh:
MCP Client 初始化
读取配置: ~/.claude/mcp.json

annotation.zh: 启动时读取 MCP 配置
通过 stdio 连接本地 MCP Server
annotation.en: Connect to local MCP Server via stdio

content.zh:
连接 github server:
→ OAuth2 认证
← Authorization: Bearer <token>
→ initialize
← { tools: 3 }
content.en:
Connect to github server:
→ OAuth2 authentication
← Authorization: Bearer <token>
→ initialize
← { tools: 3 }

annotation.zh: GitHub Server 需要 OAuth 认证

content.zh: 帮我在 GitHub 上创建一个 PR
content.en: Help me create a PR on GitHub

annotation.zh: 用户请求触发 MCP 工具调用
annotation.en: User request triggers MCP tool call

steps.content:
{ tool: 'github.createPR',
  input: { title: 'Fix auth bug', branch: 'fix/login' } }

annotation.zh: 模型调用 MCP 工具

content.zh:
MCP 分发:
  tool: 'github.createPR'
  → 路由到 server: 'github'
  → tools/call { name: 'createPR', args }
content.en:
MCP dispatch:
  tool: 'github.createPR'
  → Route to server: 'github'
  → tools/call { name: 'createPR', args }

annotation.zh: MCP Client 将调用转发到对应 Server
annotation.en: MCP Client forwards call to corresponding Server

annotation.zh: MCP Server 执行并返回结果
annotation.en: MCP Server executes and returns result
